channels.label: Direct grants
channels.description: Non-repayable capital deployed directly to priority reconstruction projects, particularly social infrastructure and cultural heritage.

channels.label: Concessional debt
channels.description: Below-market loans to municipalities and state enterprises for energy, water, and transport reconstruction.

channels.label: Equity & quasi-equity
channels.description: DFI-style equity co-investments in commercially viable reconstruction assets, primarily energy and industrial.

channels.label: Availability payments
channels.description: Structured payments to PPP contractors guaranteeing service availability — mitigates revenue risk for private capital.

channels.label: Endowment reserve
channels.description: Liquid reserve maintaining Trust solvency and covering operating costs during deployment hiatus.
